'''zafaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaerthe|zaerthe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-f-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaerthe|zaerthe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zafaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæfæhæth|zæfæhæth]] || [[word:zæfæhæj|zæfæhæj]] || [[word:zæfæhæsh|zæfæhæsh]] || [[word:zæfæhæ|zæfæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zafafahath|zafafahath]] || [[word:zafafahaj|zafafahaj]] || [[word:zafafahash|zafafahash]] || [[word:zafafaha|zafafaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zafahath|zafahath]] || [[word:zafahaj|zafahaj]] || [[word:zafahash|zafahash]] || [[word:zafaha|zafaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zafafhath|zafafhath]] || [[word:zafafhaj|zafafhaj]] || [[word:zafafhash|zafafhash]] || [[word:zafafhaf|zafafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zafahatha|zafahatha]] || [[word:zafahaja|zafahaja]] || [[word:zafahasha|zafahasha]] || [[word:zafahaka|zafahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zafahath|zafahath]] || [[word:zafahaj|zafahaj]] || [[word:zafahash|zafahash]] || [[word:zafaha|zafaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zafahathal|zafahathal]] || [[word:zafahajal|zafahajal]] || [[word:zafahashal|zafahashal]] || [[word:zafahakal|zafahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zafahathatha|zafahathatha]] || [[word:zafahajaja|zafahajaja]] || [[word:zafahashasha|zafahashasha]] || [[word:zafahaka|zafahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zafahathan|zafahathan]] || [[word:zafahajan|zafahajan]] || [[word:zafahashan|zafahashan]] || [[word:zafahakan|zafahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zafahathaoro|zafahathaoro]] || [[word:zafahajaoro|zafahajaoro]] || [[word:zafahashaoro|zafahashaoro]] || [[word:zafahakaoro|zafahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
